tools._dedup_file_events: Deduplicate consecutive file writes to the same path.

director-daemon.summary: Autonomous comms orchestrator — extracts, indexes, and searches email and Teams messages. Runs on cron, self-heals with Claude when jobs fail. Exposes a shadow copy database for agent-level comms intelligence.
director-daemon.scope_rationale: Personal orchestration daemon relevant to all work contexts; aggregates comms and alerts
director-daemon.risk_notes: Accesses personal communications and security data. High sensitivity — internal only.

installation.last_commit_message: Consolidate runtime data under ~/.director-daemon/

docs.overview: The Director Daemon is a background service that continuously extracts communications from Outlook (email) and Microsoft Teams into a local SQLite database (comms.db). It provides full-text search, attention scoring, entity extraction, and thread retrieval to any Claude Code agent via MCP.
docs.architecture: Zero AI tokens on the happy path — every job is plain Python on cron. Claude only intervenes when something breaks: reads the adapter code, diagnoses, patches, retries, and documents the fix.

tools.search_comms: Full-text search across all communications. Supports keyword queries, date ranges, source filtering. Returns messages with attention scores, entities, and metadata.
tools.get_thread: Fetch a complete conversation thread by thread ID. Returns all messages in chronological order with participants and metadata.
tools.get_high_attention: Get messages ranked by attention score (AI-computed priority). Surfaces items that likely need human response or action.
tools.list_sources: List all communication sources (email accounts, Teams channels) with message counts and last sync timestamps.
tools.get_recent: Get recent messages, optionally filtered by source type. Useful for checking what came in since last review.
tools.get_entities: Query extracted entities: people, companies, topics, action items. Built from NLP analysis of all messages.
tools.report: File a structured report (bug, observation, recommendation) that gets deduped and tracked. Used by other agents to flag issues.
tools.known_issues: List open issues/reports filed via the report tool. Shows status, severity, occurrence count, and priority score.

docs.security_notes: Accesses ALL email and Teams messages. Contains sensitive business communications, personal messages, financial discussions, and confidential client data. Should only be scoped to workspaces where comms access is appropriate.

tools.inbox: Fetch recent emails from the inbox.
tools.read_email: Read a single email by ID. Returns full body text.
tools.mark_read: Mark one or more emails as read (or unread).
tools.reply_email: Reply to an email. Adds proper threading headers and quotes the original.
tools.forward_email: Forward an email to another recipient.
tools.undelete_email: Restore a soft-deleted email from trash.
tools.sync_inbox: Trigger IMAP sync to fetch new emails from the mail server.

docs.security_notes: Accesses sensitive data: emails, contacts, personal communications. HIGH SENSITIVITY. Full email access — read, send, delete. Can compose and send emails on behalf of the user.
